recommendations.title: Barbie: Princess Adventure
recommendations.overview: With new friends in a new kingdom, Barbie learns what it means to be herself when she trades places with a royal lookalike in this musical adventure.

recommendations.title: Barbie: Dolphin Magic
recommendations.overview: Barbie and her sisters take off on another exciting, global adventure to visit their friend Ken at his summer internship at a beautiful and exotic coral reef.

recommendations.title: Barbie Presents: Thumbelina
recommendations.overview: Meet a tiny girl named Thumbelina who lives in harmony with nature in the magical world of the Twillerbees that's hidden among the wildflowers. At the whim of a spoiled young girl named Makena, Thumbelina and her two friends have their patch of wildf

recommendations.title: Barbie in A Mermaid Tale
recommendations.overview: Barbie stars as Merliah, a surfer who learns a shocking secret: she's a mermaid! She and her dolphin friend set out for an undersea adventure to rescue her mother, the queen of Oceana.

recommendations.title: Barbie Video Game Hero
recommendations.overview: When Barbie is accidentally pulled into her favourite game, she teams up with the roller skater Bella and her friend Cutie, to stop a mischievous emoji who is trying to take control of the game.

recommendations.title: Barbie: Fairytopia
recommendations.overview: Elina is a flower fairy who discovers that her home of Magic Meadow has been overcome by a horrible malady that is killing the flowers and making the fairies unable to fly. With the help of Bibble, a puffball and a giant butterfly named Hue she attem

recommendations.title: Barbie: Spy Squad
recommendations.overview: Barbie and her best friends Teresa and Renee transform from hard-working gymnasts to undercover secret agents. When their amazing gymnastics skills catch the eye of a top-secret spy agency, the girls are soon following clues to a gem-stealing cat bur

recommendations.title: Barbie & Her Sisters in a Puppy Chase
recommendations.overview: Barbie and her sisters go to an island paradise for a dance competition, but they must work together as a team to find their pets after their furry friends go missing at a horse festival.
recommendations.director: Ken Cunningham, Michael Goguen, Conrad Helten

recommendations.title: Barbie Mariposa & the Fairy Princess
recommendations.overview: Join Mariposa and her new friend, Princess Catania, in this magical adventure to save the fairy land of Shimmervale. Together, the girls learn that with great friends, the sky is the limit.

recommendations.title: Barbie: Princess Charm School
recommendations.overview: Blair, a waitress in the kingdom of Gardania, realises that she strongly resembles the region's missing queen. She then gets to go to Princess Charm School and causes problems for the teacher.
